task_title: The email report script is crashing

scores.justification: Agent explicitly requested all 50 users with `--limit 50` and received the complete dataset, not just the default 10-record page.
Agent identified all three users with null emails: u023 (Kai Ito), u031 (Eden Gomez), and u049 (Wren Adler), confirmed via both direct inspection and a Python filter.
Agent explained that naive code attempting string operations, regex matching, or passing null to an SMTP library would crash with a vague 'something null' error.
Agent recommended two concrete approaches: (1) skip null-email users with a guard check before processing, or (2) route them to a separate section of the report rather than attempting to send mail.
